definition.name: def-jb-algebra
definition.definition: A Jordan Banach algebra is a real Jordan algebra A with a complete norm satisfying ||a circ b|| <= ||a|| ||b||. A JB-algebra is a Jordan Banach algebra whose norm additionally satisfies ||a^2|| = ||a||^2 and ||a^2|| <= ||a^2 + b^2|| for all a,b. A unital JB-algebra has an identity 1.
